content:
# Recommendations — for iter-006 plan

## Closest-to-completion / ready now
- **`grassmannianScheme` (Functors.lean:263) — the axiom-independent BUILD milestone.**
  `grassmannian_cocycle` is now PROVEN, so the transition-iso cocycle (`t`-field) of the
  `Scheme.GlueData` is ready. Dispatch a `mathlib-build` lane on the prover's 6-step
  decomposition (`task_results/Functors.lean.md`): charts `Fin d ↪ Fin r`; frame matrix
  `X^I` over `MvPolynomial`; `U^I = Spec`; overlaps `D(P^I_J)`, `P^I_J = det
  (X^I).submatrix id J`; transition maps `θ` (cocycle = the proven lemma); assemble
  `GlueData.glued`. This unblocks the whole §1 Grassmannian chain
  (`grassmannian_separated/_proper/_represents`, lines 343/351/371/385/405). NO EGA-III
  dependency. **This is the single highest-value reachable target.**

## Blocked — do NOT re-assign as tactic targets (need a BUILD first)
- **`quot_properness` 2nd conjunct (QuotConstruction.lean:293).** Reduced to one named
  gap `IsSeparated (relativeProj.structureMorphism S F)`. UNPROVABLE for the current
  `sorryAx` stub. Planner's iter-005 "reachable, no EGA-III needed" tag was WRONG —
  correct it. Add **`IsSeparated (relativeProj.structureMorphism S V)`** to the
  `relativeProj` EGA-III anchor's obligation list (`task_pending.md`/STRATEGY); it
  discharges for free once relative Proj is built. Proof scaffold is otherwise complete.
- **`flatness_local_criterion` part(2) (Variants.lean:208).** `IsOpen {y | flat stalk}`
  = **EGA IV 11.1.1 / 11.3.1 (openness of flatness)**, confirmed absent from Mathlib
  (only `Algebra.isOpen_smoothLocus`, `Module.freeLocus`). Open a dedicated BUILD
  objective (Tor-local criterion + generic flatness + noetherian induction); memo +
  outline already in `informal/flatness_local_criterion_flat_locus.md`. Not ~100 LOC;
  no informal-agent key available.
- **All §5/§6 EGA-III gap-blocked bodies** (per iter-004 "do NOT re-assign"):
  `quot_grothendieck`, `quot_altmanKleiman`, `quot_projectiveSpace`, `quot_reduction`,
  `quot_uniformRegularity`, `quot_embedGrassmannian`, `quot_flatteningStratum`
  (QuotConstruction); `quot_open_subfunctor`, `stronglyQuasiprojectiveQuot`,
  `coherent_prolongation`, `quasiprojectiveQuot`, `hilbertScheme_exists`,
  `isomorphism_is_open`, `schemeOfMorphisms`, `projectiveFlatQuotient` (Variants); the
  EGA-III stubs in Functors (lines 63–247) and the 5 `Basic.lean` stubs.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered
- **`convert h using N` for haveI-in-statement instance obligations.** When the planner
  bakes `haveI : Inst := by sorry` into a theorem's *type*, the proven instance is not
  defeq to a locally-rebuilt one → `exact h` gives a `Type mismatch` on the
  `Invertible.invOf … this` subterm. Finish with `convert h using N` (instance is a
  `Subsingleton`). (Already in `ARCHON_MEMORY`/user memory.)
- **Column-minor commutes past a left factor:** `(A·M).submatrix id K = A·(M.submatrix
  id K)`, proved by `ext i j; simp [Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.submatrix_apply]`.
- **Set-level fppf descent is provable without EGA:** flat+qc+surjective ⟹
  `IsQuotientMap` (`Flat.isQuotientMap_of_surjective`) gives closed ↔ preimage-closed;
  `Scheme.Pullback.exists_preimage_pullback` converts the kernel-pair descent hypothesis
  into set saturation. Only the scheme-structure (ideal-sheaf) descent stays gapped.

## Process note for the planner
- **Probe gap-status per statement, not by inheritance.** Two iter-005 gap tags were
  wrong in *opposite* directions (`quot_properness` under-tagged, `descent_of_subschemes`
  over-tagged). When the planner deactivates a target as "gap-blocked", note it as a
  *hypothesis* the prover may overturn (and the prover did, on `descent_of_subschemes`).

## Coverage / structure
- `archon dag-query unmatched/gaps/frontier` all **0**. blueprint-doctor: clean (every
  chapter `\input`'d, all `\ref`/`\uses` resolve, no `axiom`). No coverage debt this iter
  (no new helper decls introduced — only existing bodies filled).
